taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: Database Query Languages, Data Validation, Manual Testing, Test Planning, Regression Testing
skill_match_scores: Database Query Languages:1.0, Data Validation:0.0, Manual Testing:1.0, Test Planning:0.5, Regression Testing:1.0
must_have_quals: Extensive experience with database query languages and data validation, Extensive experience with manual testing of complex and legacy software systems, Proven ability to create technical documents and training materials, including user guides, process documentation, and reference manuals, Strong critical thinking and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze issues from multiple angles, Excellent written communication skills, with the ability to convey technical concepts clearly and effectively
preferred_quals: Experience with multivalue databases (such as UniData or UniVerse), Experience with oil and gas accounting software or related industry processes, Broad knowledge of financial markets and securities operations, with exposure to Trust and Fiduciary products
core_responsibilities: Develop, document, and execute comprehensive test plans, test cases, and regression tests for legacy software applications, Conduct detailed manual testing to identify defects, inconsistencies, and performance issues across functional areas, Write and execute complex database queries to validate data integrity and troubleshoot issues, Collaborate with product managers, developers, and business stakeholders to understand requirements and confirm acceptance criteria, Produce high-quality technical documentation, user guides, and training materials for internal and external audiences, Participate in requirement reviews, design walkthroughs, and release planning activities, Contribute to process improvement efforts and advocate for quality throughout the development lifecycle
job_summary: SS&C Technologies is a leading financial services and healthcare technology company headquartered in Windsor, Connecticut. They are seeking a Software Quality Assurance Analyst responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of trust accounting and asset management software products through test planning, execution, and documentation.
